props.headline: Achieve Your Nursing Goals in Canada
props.subhead: As Aditi Sharma knows, balancing shifts and study is tough. CELPIP is recognised for its fairness and flexibility, making it the ideal English test for busy nurses like you.
props.imageAlt: A nurse studying with CELPIP materials while on a break during a clinical shift.

props.heading: CELPIP Features for Aditi Sharma
props.subheading: Discover how CELPIP supports your journey to licensure in Canada.

features.title: Flexible Scheduling
features.desc: CELPIP is available at convenient times, fitting your busy shifts as a nurse.

features.title: Comprehensive Assessment
features.desc: The test evaluates listening, reading, writing, and speaking skills, ensuring a complete proficiency check.

features.title: Quick Results
features.desc: Receive your results in just 4 to 5 days, helping you move forward with your licensure process.

pillars.title: Recognised by Authorities
pillars.desc: CELPIP is recognised by FMRAC and CAPR, making it a reliable choice for your nursing licensure in Canada.

pillars.title: Convenient Scheduling
pillars.desc: With testing times that fit your busy shifts, CELPIP allows you to prepare and test at your convenience.

pillars.title: Comprehensive Assessment
pillars.desc: CELPIP evaluates all four language skills: listening, reading, writing, and speaking, ensuring a complete assessment.

props.heading: Upcoming CELPIP Sittings
props.subheading: Find a convenient CELPIP test sitting that fits your busy schedule, just like Aditi Sharma, as you work towards your CLB 8 in Canada.

props.heading: Join Aditi Sharma on Her Journey to Canada
props.subheading: As an Indian registered nurse, you can take the CELPIP test to support your licensure process. Sign up today to receive updates and tips on preparing for the test, recognised by FMRAC and CAPR.
